title: pycnocycla spinosa var. spinosa
intro: Pycnocycla spinosa var. spinosa is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae and is native to the Middle East and North Africa. It is also known as the "devil's thorn" due to its spiny appearance. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pycnocycla spinosa var. spinosa include treating various health issues such as digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, and herbal preparations often include the plant's roots and leaves, which are typically dried, crushed, and made into teas or infusions.
